source_title: 04 Tunnel - Raya and the Last Dragon/11 Creating the Walls and Ceiling

evidences.content: 好了，现在我们回到了虚幻中，让我们执行与之前相同的过程。 All right, now that we're back in Unreal, let's do the same process as before. 我们将创建一个新的矩形。 And we'll create a new rectangle. 确保设置为 200 乘 200 厘米。 Make sure that it's set to 200 by 200 centimeters. 我们向下滚动到 "网格操作"，然后点击 "Remesh"。 We'll scroll down to Mesh Ops and click Remesh. 并将其设置为 100 万个三角形。 And set it to 1 million triangles. 现在，让我们导入位移。 And now let's import our displacement. 然后我们进入变形、位移，将其更改为纹理 2D 贴图，然后导入图像。 Then we'll go to Deform, Displace, change it to Texture 2D Map, and import our image. 现在我们有了漂亮的三维位移。 And now we have our nice three-dimensional displacement. 因此，如果我们看一下结果，就会发现我们有很多与参照物相同的蛛丝马迹。 So if we look at the result, we can see we have a lot of the same telltale signs as our reference. 再说一遍，我们只是想与它的精神相吻合，而不是一比一的再现。 Again, we're just trying to match the spirit of it, not get a one-to-one recreation. 但唯独缺少的就是这些铺在所有东西下面的小石砖。 But the one thing that is missing are these little stone bricks underneath everything. 因此，让我们在表面再做一次位移，以获得更多的墙面细节。 So let's do another displacement on our surface to get more detail out of our walls. 因此，让我们将堡垒石墙的位移也应用到我们的平面上。 So let's take the displacement from our fort stone wall and also apply this to our plane. 所以，回到 "置换 "吧。 So go back to Displace. 现在，我要点击我们的堡垒石墙材料，然后浏览到我们的文件夹 Now I'm going to click on our fort stone wall material and browse to our folder 在那里我们可以找到我们的位移。 where we can find our displacement. 现在，让我们回到 "纹理 2D 贴图"，而不是 "佩林噪声"。 And now instead of Perlin Noise, let's go back to Texture 2D Map. 引入该纹理贴图并选择蓝色通道。 Bring in this texture map and select the blue channel. 现在你可以看到，我们的网格顶部出现了一些漂亮的断裂。 And now you can see we get some nice breakup on the top of our mesh. 为此，让我们增大 UV 比例。 For this, let's increase the UV scale. 因此，我把它加倍，这样我们的位移就有两倍的平铺。 So I'll just double it so that our displacement has twice the tiling. 然后，我们可以将位移强度降至 7.5。 And then we can decrease our displacement intensity down to 7.5. 让我们按下 "接受 "键。 And let's press Accept. 现在，让我们复制堡垒石墙，并将其应用到我们的素材中。 Now let's duplicate that fort stone wall and apply it to our material. 但是，我们需要加倍铺平，这样才能使一切都正确对齐。 But we'll need to double the tiling so that everything lines up correctly. 因此，在顶部，我们要将 X 和 Y 的平铺改为 2。 So at the top, we'll change our tiling in X and Y to 2. 满意之后，我们就可以简化网格了。 Now that we're happy with this, we can simplify our mesh. 我们将把目标百分比降至 18%。 And we'll change our target percentage down to 18. 现在，我们有了墙壁资产。 And now we have our wall asset. 让我们把它带进我们的隧道，看看它在上下文中是什么样子的。 Let's bring this into our tunnel and see what it looks like in context. 同时确保保存此资产，并启用 Nanite 支持 Also make sure to save this asset and let's enable Nanite support 这样在我们的场景中运行起来就会更流畅一些。 so it runs a little bit smoother inside of our scene. 因此，在这种情况下看到这一点很酷。 So this is cool to see in context. 但我们有一个明显的问题，我们需要这些曲线 But we have an obvious problem where we need these to curve 就像我们参考文献中的隧道一样。 like the tunnel in our reference. 因此，要做到这一点非常简单。 So this is really simple to do. 让我们回到建模模式。 Let's just pop back into modeling mode. 让我们浏览一下静态网格，确保有一个副本作为备份。 Let's browse to our static mesh and make sure we have a duplicate as a backup. 因为无论我们对它做什么改动，都会影响到静态网格文件。 Because whatever change we make to this will happen to the static mesh file. 我们可能无法挽回。 And we might not be able to recover it. 但现在，如果我们进入变形选项并点击翘曲、 But now if we go to the deform options and click warp, 我们有几种不同的方法来弯曲我们的资产。 we have a couple different ways that we can bend our asset. 因此，默认操作是弯曲。 So the default operation is bend. 我们可以看到这样的弧线。 And we can see that the arc that this is going on. 因此，如果我们将 Y 轴旋转 90 度、 So if we just rotate this in Y by 90 degrees, 在这里，我可以将抢拍设置为 90 度。 and I can do that by having our snapping set to 90 degrees here. 现在，我们的资产就像墙壁一样弯曲。 Now our asset is bending just like our walls. 我要把这个从 90 度降低到 75 度。 And I'm going to reduce this just a bit from 90 degrees to 75. 现在，我们的墙壁大致弯曲成与我们的墙体相同的形状。 And now our walls bend roughly to the same shape as our block out. 我想我们可以把这个规模扩大一点。 I think we could scale this up just a little bit. 因此，将其提高到 1.2 左右。 So increase this to about 1.2. 让我们复制这个，然后翻转到另一侧。 And let's duplicate this and flip it around for the opposite side. 现在，让我们在隧道的长度上再增加几个实例。 And now let's add a couple more instances down the length of our tunnel. 顺便说一句，我们必须重新启用 Nanite 支持 By the way, we'll have to re-enable Nanite support 每次我们使用建模工具更新这个网格时，都会使用"......"。 every time we update this mesh using the modeling tools. 现在，我们的洞穴真的开始逐渐成形了。 And now our cave is really starting to come together. 我注意到的一点是我们墙壁上的纹理 The one thing that I'm noticing is our textures on the walls 虽然对比度越来越大。 are getting really contrasty though. 我要去反照率控制区，把对比度降到 0.6。 I'm going to go over to the albedo controls and reduce the contrast down to 0.6. 然后将亮度降低到 0.4 或 0.3 左右。 And then we'll reduce the brightness down to about 0.4, 0.3, something like that. 这看起来很棒。 This is looking great. 所以，我们还是做一个新的位移吧。 So let's just make a new displacement. 这样，我们就可以在天花板上铺设对称的东西了。 So we have something symmetrical to lay across our ceiling. 因此，我将在这里快进制作天花板位移。 So I'm going to fast forward through making the ceiling displacement here. 但最重要的是，我们想要的是可以复制的东西 But the big idea is we just want something that we can duplicate 从我们的天花板中央向下。 down the center of our ceiling. 要做到这一点，我们需要能够在两个方向上铺设瓷砖。 And to do this, we'll need to be able to tile this in both directions. 因此，我们需要在隧道内铺设瓷砖 So we'll need to tile it down the length of the tunnel 并使其与我们的洞穴墙壁相交。 and also have it so it'll intersect with our cave wall pieces. 这样，我们所有的几何图形都会排列整齐 And this way, all of our geometry will line up 如果我们将 75 度的弯曲角度应用到每一个模块上。 if we apply that same 75 degree bend angle to each one of our modular pieces. 所以，一旦你完成了整个场景的填充工作、 So once you're finished populating this throughout the scene, 确保启动另一个进度渲染。 make sure to kick off another progress render. 使用该屏蔽影片渲染 qconfig Use that block out movie render qconfig 这样我们就可以保存进度，并在最后回顾。 so that we can save our progress and look back at it at the end.
evidences.speaker: instructor
